nasb.text: And with you I shatter the shepherd and his flock, And with you I shatter the farmer and his team, And with you I shatter governors and prefects.

esv.text: with you I break in pieces the shepherd and his flock; with you I break in pieces the farmer and his team; with you I break in pieces governors and commanders.

cnv.text: 我用你打碎牧人和他的羊群， 用你打碎農夫和他的耕牛， 用你打碎省長和總監。

ccb.text: 打碎牧人和牲畜， 打碎农夫和耕牛， 打碎省长和总督。”
